agents.name: BUILD PRODUCT
agents.role: Product builder agent for PLR, MRR, RR, prompt packs, templates, mini courses, and digital assets.
agents.mission: Turn raw source material into a packaged, deliverable digital product with bonuses, backend offers, and an improvement path.
agents.final_output: A complete product pack: core product, bonuses, delivery structure, upsell/backend plan, and version roadmap.

steps.name: Nghien cuu san pham
steps.output: Research brief with niche, market demand, competitors, buyer pains, and validation notes.
checklist: Read source files, PLR licenses, market notes, buyer comments, and competitor examples.
Score demand, freshness, rebrand potential, risk, and ease of creation.
Reject weak or risky angles before product creation starts.

steps.name: Len y tuong va dinh vi
steps.output: Product concept with buyer avatar, promise, title angles, USP, and pricing idea.
checklist: Pick a narrow buyer segment.
Transform generic PLR into a fresh promise.
Write product names, positioning angles, and offer boundaries.

steps.name: Tao san pham so
steps.output: Core product assets such as ebook, prompt pack, templates, checklist, mini course, or digital files.
checklist: Choose the simplest format that can deliver the promise.
Create reusable assets instead of only long-form theory.
Keep claims realistic and license-safe.

steps.name: Xay dung noi dung
steps.output: Module content, lessons, worksheets, examples, scripts, and implementation steps.
checklist: Rewrite source material with a new angle.
Add examples, checklists, prompts, and current workflows.
Remove outdated claims, copied copy, and unsupported income promises.

steps.name: Dong goi san pham
steps.output: Clean product structure with start-here file, modules, filenames, bundle map, and manifest.
checklist: Organize files in buyer-friendly order.
Use simple names and numbered folders.
Add a start-here guide and usage instructions.

steps.name: Tao bonus
steps.output: Bonus stack with quick wins, templates, swipe files, extra prompts, and value logic.
checklist: Add bonuses that help buyers implement faster.
Avoid fake inflated values.
Match each bonus to a real objection or desired shortcut.

steps.name: Thiet ke va trinh bay
steps.output: Design notes, cover/mockup direction, formatting checklist, and presentation polish.
checklist: Make product easy to scan and use.
Prepare cover, mockup, thumbnails, or layout guidance.
Check visual consistency across PDFs, docs, and delivery assets.

steps.name: Setup giao hang
steps.output: Delivery page, download page, member access notes, hosting checklist, and buyer email.
checklist: Confirm files are zipped and accessible.
Create simple access instructions.
Include refund/support and license reminders.

steps.name: Tao upsell backend
steps.output: OTO/backend plan with upsell, downsell, agency license, and continuity ideas.
checklist: Build backend offers from logical next steps.
Keep upsells complementary, not required for the front-end promise.
Add pricing and delivery notes.

steps.name: Cai tien san pham
steps.output: Feedback plan, update log, rebrand ideas, and version 2.0 roadmap.
checklist: Collect buyer questions and failure points.
Turn support issues into updates.
Plan v2.0 with stronger assets and clearer positioning.

agents.name: JV MANAGER
agents.role: Launch partner manager for affiliate recruitment, JV coordination, traffic pushes, and long-term relationships.
agents.mission: Prepare and manage the affiliate/JV side of a launch from recruitment through post-launch follow-up.
agents.final_output: A launch partner system: prospect list, outreach, calendar, promo assets, support scripts, contest, and relationship tracker.

steps.name: Tim affiliate doi tac
steps.output: Affiliate and partner prospect list with contact notes, fit score, and priority.
checklist: Find affiliates who already promote similar offers.
Segment by relationship strength and traffic source.
Avoid partners whose audience is a poor fit.

steps.name: Outreach va ket noi
steps.output: DM/email outreach sequence, follow-up scripts, and relationship notes.
checklist: Personalize outreach by partner type.
Lead with why the offer fits their audience.
Track replies, objections, and next action.

steps.name: Lap ke hoach launch
steps.output: Launch calendar, timeline, pre-launch tasks, and responsibility checklist.
checklist: Set dates for warmup, review access, cart open, and close.
Define daily tasks and promo pushes.
Prepare fallback actions for weak early traction.

steps.name: Chuan bi promo materials
steps.output: JV page, affiliate swipe, email swipes, banners, review access, and bonus details.
checklist: Give affiliates ready-to-send copy.
Include angles for different list types.
Make review access and commission details easy to find.

steps.name: Ho tro affiliate
steps.output: Support FAQ, reply scripts, bonus coordination, and performance updates.
checklist: Answer affiliate questions quickly.
Share promo reminders without spamming.
Help affiliates choose the best angle for their audience.

steps.name: Leaderboard va contest
steps.output: Contest rules, prizes, leaderboard tracking, and incentive notes.
checklist: Define fair contest rules before launch.
Track top affiliates and milestone prizes.
Use incentives to increase promo frequency.

steps.name: Quan ly traffic va promo
steps.output: Traffic plan, promo schedule, daily check-ins, and channel performance notes.
checklist: Coordinate email, social, community, and paid/partner traffic.
Watch conversions and refund risk.
Shift emphasis toward angles that convert.

steps.name: Sau launch
steps.output: Thank-you follow-up, payout notes, results recap, and relaunch ideas.
checklist: Thank every serious affiliate.
Summarize numbers, lessons, and testimonials.
Plan the next promo window.

steps.name: Quan ly network JV lau dai
steps.output: Long-term JV CRM, partner tiers, future launch notes, and relationship schedule.
checklist: Keep partner notes current.
Tag affiliates by traffic quality and reliability.
Create a calendar for future collaborations.

agents.name: SALE PAGE
agents.role: Direct-response sales page agent for offer research, copy, page structure, funnel pages, and conversion testing.
agents.mission: Turn offer notes and product assets into conversion-focused sales pages and funnel copy with realistic claims.
agents.final_output: A complete front-end sales page plus funnel page copy, CTA map, FAQ, guarantee, and optimization checklist.

steps.name: Nghien cuu offer va buyer
steps.output: Buyer research brief with pains, desires, objections, proof needs, and competing offers.
checklist: Study buyer language and urgent problems.
Identify what the buyer already tried.
List objections that the page must answer.

steps.name: Xay offer
steps.output: Offer stack with promise, mechanism, value proposition, price anchor, and risk reversal.
checklist: Define what the buyer gets and why it matters.
Make the offer specific enough to visualize.
Keep promises useful but believable.

steps.name: Headline va hook
steps.output: Headline bank, subheadline options, opening hook, curiosity angle, and pain angle.
checklist: Write multiple headline angles.
Match hook to buyer awareness level.
Avoid exaggerated results claims.

steps.name: Viet sales copy
steps.output: Full sales copy with problem, story, bullets, objection handling, and close.
checklist: Translate features into practical buyer outcomes.
Use proof and specificity where available.
Remove hype that increases refund or compliance risk.

steps.name: Trinh bay san pham
steps.output: What-is-inside section, module breakdown, use cases, and who-it-is-for section.
checklist: Show product components clearly.
Explain how each module helps the buyer.
Make product assets easy to understand before purchase.

steps.name: Bonus stack
steps.output: Bonus section with bonus names, reasons, quick-win logic, and scarcity/urgency notes.
checklist: Connect bonuses to objections or speed.
Avoid fake value math.
Use scarcity only when it is true.

steps.name: Guarantee va FAQ
steps.output: Refund policy, guarantee copy, FAQ, and objection removal section.
checklist: Answer buying friction directly.
Keep refund terms clear.
Handle license, access, skill level, and time objections.

steps.name: CTA va conversion elements
steps.output: CTA copy, button labels, proof elements, countdown notes, trust elements, and page flow checklist.
checklist: Place CTA after belief-building sections.
Use clear action language.
Add proof and trust where available.

steps.name: Funnel pages
steps.output: Front-end, OTO, upsell, downsell, thank-you, and delivery page copy notes.
checklist: Keep each page to one decision.
Make upsells logical next steps.
Confirm thank-you and access instructions are clear.

steps.name: Toi uu va test
steps.output: Testing plan with headline tests, CTA tests, objections, heatmap notes, and conversion log.
checklist: Test headline, offer stack, proof, price, and CTA.
Track conversion rate and refund signals.
Keep a changelog for each page version.
